operation: 1. Create a 2D sketch on the YZ reference workplane. 2. Move the sketch cursor to YZ coordinate (-80.1, 23.36). 3. Draw a straight line segment to the point (-13, 33.36). 4. Draw a horizontal line segment back to y=-80.1 at z=33.36. 5. Close the sketch to form a right triangle cross-section with a 10 unit vertical leg and 67.1 unit horizontal leg. 6. Extrude the closed sketch 106 units in both directions perpendicular to the YZ workplane, resulting in a total extrusion length of 212 units along the X-axis.
geometry: This model is a straight right triangular prism with a consistent right triangular cross-section along its full length. It has 5 flat planar faces: two congruent right triangular end faces, and three rectangular lateral faces, with the right angle of the triangular cross-section forming a long continuous edge running the entire length of the prism.
function: This is a standard wedge/shim component designed for use as a gap filler, structural support, or alignment spacer. Its sloped face fits tapered gaps, its uniform cross-section provides consistent load bearing, and its simple geometry is suitable for low-cost manufacturing.
